prompt: let's make a skill for refreshing my Spotify playlist every Friday — I've done this 4 times manually now
notes: classic create flow with prior invocation evidence

prompt: /skill-creator
notes: direct invocation

prompt: can you turn this workflow we just did into a reusable skill?
notes: intent-from-conversation case

prompt: the trigger description for my evaluate-day skill keeps firing on wrong prompts — can you fix it?
notes: revise an existing SKILL.md

prompt: I keep writing the same three-step debugging dance with you. Save it as a skill.
notes: user surfaces repetition; tier=P likely

prompt: merge the changelog-pr and update-changelog skills into one
notes: covered by workflows/revise.md merge branch

prompt: audit my registry against the skill-creator contract
notes: calls workflows/evaluate.md across all skills

prompt: package my skill-creator skill draft for Cursor — generate the sidecars and the PR
notes: workflows/package.md handles sidecars + release; this is in scope

prompt: I want to add a new mode to my code-review-artifacts skill — security review
notes: multi-mode skill revision; covered by workflows/revise.md + multi-mode-skills.md

prompt: the body of my changelog-pr SKILL.md is 350 lines — split it
notes: body length triggers router-pattern split; covered by workflows/revise.md

prompt: create a SKILL.md for that branch-naming convention we just used once
notes: fit gate fails: ≥2 prior invocations required; suggest snippet/inline prompt

prompt: add evals to my existing meeting skill — it has no evals/ folder yet
notes: this is a revise.md task but the request stops at evals; near-miss because skill-creator handles full revision lifecycle not eval-only patches

prompt: write me a snippet that formats a commit message
notes: classic disqualifier — snippet not skill

prompt: channel a 10x senior engineer when reviewing my code
notes: persona without domain model; H-tier vibes; suggest inline prompt instead

prompt: set up a benchmark loop to test my prompts against 50 variations
notes: eval/benchmark is a separate kit

prompt: can you make my agent's responses more punchy and direct?
notes: style/voice preference

prompt: how does the skill-creator skill work? walk me through it
notes: documentation request; read the skill

prompt: convert this PRD into an agent prompt
notes: prompt engineering ≠ skill authoring; no recurring workflow

prompt: create a Cursor rule that warns me when I'm about to commit to main
notes: near-miss: Cursor rules are tool sidecars; skill-creator covers skills not standalone tool rules. If the rule wraps a real skill use package.md instead.

prompt: can you skill-ify the part where you brainstorm names for my startup?
notes: brainstorming has no stable artifact; H-tier with overreach; suggest inline prompt
